subject: Regarding Invited Talk on Securing AI Systems
body:
Dear DR Academics

CSE Department is organizing an invited talk in the area of Security AI Systems which will cover Cyber Attacks and Defenses in the area. Please circulate among UG/PG/PhD  students of the Institute for attendance. 

The details of Speaker and Venue are attached below.
raw:
Message-ID: <1776179328527.6e2e256b@securemail>
From: ronak@project.local
To: prashant@project.local, kiran@project.local
Subject: Regarding Invited Talk on Securing AI Systems

Dear DR Academics

CSE Department is organizing an invited talk in the area of Security AI Systems which will cover Cyber Attacks and Defenses in the area. Please circulate among UG/PG/PhD  students of the Institute for attendance. 

The details of Speaker and Venue are attached below.
